steps.title: Write the height
steps.content: Let the radius be $r$. The height is $8$ inches longer, so the height is $r+8$.

steps.title: Use surface area
steps.content:
The surface area of a closed right circular cylinder is
$$
2\pi r^2+2\pi rh
$$
Substitute $h=r+8$ and set the result equal to the given surface area:
$$
2\pi r^2+2\pi r(r+8)=1{,}008\pi
$$

steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content: Divide by $2\pi$, then solve: $$ r^2+r(r+8)=504 $$ $$ 2r^2+8r=504 $$ $$ r^2+4r=252 $$ $$ r^2+4r-252=0 $$ $$ (r+18)(r-14)=0 $$ The positive radius is $14$. The answer is A.
